title: Less than or equal to operator (<=) in Java

content.problemStatement:
In Java, the **less than or equal to (`
The `
The `
Since characters (`char`) are internally represented as numeric Unicode values, they can be compared using `<=`:  

```java
char letterM = 'M'; // letterM holds the character 'M' (Unicode 77)  
char letterN = 'N'; // letterN holds the character 'N' (Unicode 78)  
System.out.println(letterM <= letterN);  // Outputs: true  
```
